commands.summary: Show full command help catalog or help for one command path.
Inspect engine capability metadata.
Summarize loaded state (sequences, containers, metadata).
Load a project/state file into the current state.
Save current state to a project file.
Reserved screenshot adapter command (currently disabled by security policy).
Render sequence map SVG.
Inspect TFBS, restriction-site, splicing, or isoform-architecture expert details as JSON.
commands.usage: inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID tfbs FEATURE_ID | inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID restriction CUT_POS_1BASED [--enzyme NAME] [--start START_1BASED] [--end END_1BASED] | inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID splicing FEATURE_ID | inspect-feature-expert SEQ_ID isoform PANEL_ID

commands.summary: Render TFBS, restriction-site, splicing, or isoform-architecture expert visualization as SVG.
commands.usage: render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID tfbs FEATURE_ID OUTPUT.svg | render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID restriction CUT_POS_1BASED [--enzyme NAME] [--start START_1BASED] [--end END_1BASED] OUTPUT.svg | render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID splicing FEATURE_ID OUTPUT.svg | render-feature-expert-svg SEQ_ID isoform PANEL_ID OUTPUT.svg

commands.summary: Import curated isoform-panel JSON for one sequence context.
Inspect imported isoform architecture payload as expert-view JSON.
Render imported isoform architecture as publication-oriented SVG.
Validate curated isoform-panel JSON and return a curator-oriented report.
Render RNA secondary structure SVG.
Inspect textual RNA secondary-structure report.
Render lineage graph SVG.
Render pool gel SVG with optional explicit ladders.
Inspect built-in ladder catalogs.
Export ladder definitions as JSON.
Export selected sequence IDs as a pool artifact.
Export deterministic process run bundle JSON for reproducibility/audit.
Import pool artifact members as project sequences.
List configured external/builtin agent systems from catalog.
Send prompt to one agent system and optionally execute suggested shared-shell commands.
commands.usage: agents ask SYSTEM_ID --prompt TEXT [--catalog PATH] [--base-url URL] [--model MODEL] [--timeout-secs N] [--connect-timeout-secs N] [--read-timeout-secs N] [--max-retries N] [--max-response-bytes N] [--allow-auto-exec] [--execute-all] [--execute-index N ...] [--no-state-summary]

commands.summary: List available GUI intent targets and supported query arguments.
Request opening a GUI target (prepared refs, dialogs, assistant views).
commands.usage: ui open TARGET [--genome-id GENOME_ID] [--helpers] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter TEXT] [--species TEXT] [--latest]

commands.summary: Request focusing an already-open GUI target.
commands.usage: ui focus TARGET [--genome-id GENOME_ID] [--helpers] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter TEXT] [--species TEXT] [--latest]

commands.summary: List prepared genomes/helpers for GUI intent disambiguation.
commands.usage: ui prepared-genomes [--helpers] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter TEXT] [--species TEXT] [--latest]

commands.summary: Resolve latest prepared genome/helper candidate by species query.
Fetch one GenBank accession via NCBI EFetch and import it as a sequence.
Fetch one UniProt SWISS-PROT text entry by accession or ID.
Import one local SWISS-PROT text record into project metadata.
List stored UniProt entries in project metadata.
Show one stored UniProt entry as structured JSON.
Project UniProt feature intervals onto transcript/CDS coordinates in one sequence.
commands.usage: uniprot map ENTRY_ID SEQ_ID [--projection-id ID] [--transcript ID]

commands.summary: List stored UniProt-to-genome projection records.
Show one stored UniProt-to-genome projection record.
Normalize REBASE source data into project resource JSON.
Normalize JASPAR source data into project motif JSON.
List reference genomes from catalog.
Validate reference genome catalog entries.
Inspect local availability and prep status for one genome.
List indexed genes from one reference genome.
commands.usage: genomes genes GENOME_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter REGEX] [--biotype NAME] [--limit N] [--offset N]

commands.summary: Prepare/index one reference genome locally.
commands.usage: genomes prepare GENOME_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--timeout-secs N]

commands.summary: Run BLAST query against one reference genome (quick flags plus optional JSON override object).
commands.usage: genomes blast GENOME_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: BLAST query and import hits as features on target sequence (supports optional JSON override object).
commands.usage: genomes blast-track GENOME_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE TARGET_SEQ_ID [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--track-name NAME] [--clear-existing] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extract genomic interval into a project sequence (default annotation_scope=core).
commands.usage: genomes extract-region GENOME_ID CHR START END [--output-id ID] [--annotation-scope none|core|full] [--max-annotation-features N] [--include-genomic-annotation|--no-include-genomic-annotation] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extract a named gene interval into a project sequence.
commands.usage: genomes extract-gene GENOME_ID QUERY [--occurrence N] [--output-id ID] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extend anchored genomic sequence by 5' or 3'.
commands.usage: genomes extend-anchor SEQ_ID 5p|3p LENGTH_BP [--output-id ID] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: List helper genomes from catalog.
Validate helper genome catalog entries.
Inspect local availability and prep status for one helper genome.
List indexed genes from one helper genome.
commands.usage: helpers genes HELPER_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--filter REGEX] [--biotype NAME] [--limit N] [--offset N]

commands.summary: Prepare/index one helper genome locally.
commands.usage: helpers prepare HELPER_ID [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH] [--timeout-secs N]

commands.summary: Run BLAST query against one helper genome (quick flags plus optional JSON override object).
commands.usage: helpers blast HELPER_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: BLAST query and import hits as features on target sequence (supports optional JSON override object).
commands.usage: helpers blast-track HELPER_ID QUERY_SEQUENCE TARGET_SEQ_ID [--max-hits N] [--task blastn-short|blastn] [--options-json JSON_OR_@FILE | --options-file PATH] [--track-name NAME] [--clear-existing] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extract helper-genome interval into a project sequence (default annotation_scope=core).
commands.usage: helpers extract-region HELPER_ID CHR START END [--output-id ID] [--annotation-scope none|core|full] [--max-annotation-features N] [--include-genomic-annotation|--no-include-genomic-annotation] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extract helper-gene interval into a project sequence.
commands.usage: helpers extract-gene HELPER_ID QUERY [--occurrence N] [--output-id ID] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Extend anchored helper sequence by 5' or 3'.
commands.usage: helpers extend-anchor SEQ_ID 5p|3p LENGTH_BP [--output-id ID] [--catalog PATH] [--cache-dir PATH]

commands.summary: Import BED features aligned to an anchored sequence.
commands.usage: tracks import-bed SEQ_ID PATH [--name NAME] [--min-score N] [--max-score N] [--clear-existing]

commands.summary: Import BigWig signal track aligned to an anchored sequence.
commands.usage: tracks import-bigwig SEQ_ID PATH [--name NAME] [--min-score N] [--max-score N] [--clear-existing]

commands.summary: Import VCF variants aligned to an anchored sequence.
commands.usage: tracks import-vcf SEQ_ID PATH [--name NAME] [--min-score N] [--max-score N] [--clear-existing]

commands.summary: List tracked genome-track subscriptions.
Add tracked genome-track subscription.
commands.usage: tracks tracked add PATH [--source auto|bed|bigwig|vcf] [--name NAME] [--min-score N] [--max-score N] [--clear-existing]

commands.summary: Remove one tracked genome-track subscription.
Remove all tracked genome-track subscriptions.
Apply tracked genome-track subscriptions to anchored sequences.
List persisted guide sets.
Page guides from one set.
Create or replace one guide set from JSON input.
Delete one guide set.
Apply practical design-constraint filtering to one guide set.
commands.usage: guides filter GUIDE_SET_ID [--config JSON|@FILE] [--config-file PATH] [--output-set GUIDE_SET_ID]

commands.summary: Inspect persisted practical-filter report for one guide set.
Generate guide oligo set from one guide set and template.
List generated guide oligo sets.
Inspect one generated guide oligo set.
Export generated guide oligos to csv/plate/fasta formats.
commands.usage: guides oligos-export GUIDE_SET_ID OUTPUT_PATH [--format csv_table|plate_csv|fasta] [--plate 96|384] [--oligo-set ID]

commands.summary: Export a human-readable guide oligo protocol text file.
Generate and persist a ranked primer-pair report from a DesignPrimerPairs operation payload.
Generate and persist a ranked qPCR assay report from a DesignQpcrAssays operation payload.
Probe Primer3 backend reachability/version for the selected backend/executable settings.
Resolve one feature ROI and emit seeded DesignPrimerPairs/DesignQpcrAssays operation payloads.
Resolve one splicing-group ROI and emit seeded DesignPrimerPairs/DesignQpcrAssays operation payloads.
List persisted primer-design reports.
Inspect one persisted primer-design report by report ID.
Write one persisted primer-design report to JSON.
List persisted qPCR assay design reports.
Inspect one persisted qPCR assay report by report ID.
Write one persisted qPCR assay report to JSON.
Compute and persist one dotplot payload for a sequence span.
commands.usage: dotplot compute SEQ_ID [--start N] [--end N] [--mode self_forward|self_reverse_complement] [--word-size N] [--step N] [--max-mismatches N] [--tile-bp N] [--id DOTPLOT_ID]

commands.summary: List persisted dotplot payload summaries.
Inspect one persisted dotplot payload by ID.
Compute and persist one promoter-flexibility track for a sequence span.
commands.usage: flex compute SEQ_ID [--start N] [--end N] [--model at_richness|at_skew] [--bin-bp N] [--smoothing-bp N] [--id TRACK_ID]

commands.summary: List persisted flexibility track summaries.
Inspect one persisted flexibility track payload by ID.
Interpret RNA reads (Nanopore cDNA phase-1 profile) against splicing-derived transcript templates.
commands.usage: rna-reads interpret SEQ_ID FEATURE_ID INPUT.fa [--report-id ID] [--profile nanopore_cdna_v1] [--format fasta] [--scope all_overlapping_both_strands|target_group_any_strand|all_overlapping_target_strand|target_group_target_strand] [--kmer-len N] [--short-max-bp N] [--long-window-bp N] [--long-window-count N] [--min-seed-hit-fraction F] [--align-band-bp N] [--align-min-identity F] [--max-secondary-mappings N]

commands.summary: List persisted RNA-read interpretation reports.
Inspect one persisted RNA-read interpretation report by ID.
Write one persisted RNA-read interpretation report to JSON.
Export selected interpreted RNA-read hit sequences to FASTA.
List persisted candidate sets.
Delete one candidate set.
Generate a candidate window set over one sequence.
commands.usage: candidates generate SET_NAME SEQ_ID --length N [--step N] [--feature-kind KIND] [--feature-label-regex REGEX] [--max-distance N] [--feature-geometry feature_span|feature_parts|feature_boundaries] [--feature-boundary any|five_prime|three_prime|start|end] [--strand-relation any|same|opposite] [--limit N]

commands.summary: Generate candidate windows constrained to the interval between two local sequence anchors.
commands.usage: candidates generate-between-anchors SET_NAME SEQ_ID --length N (--anchor-a-pos N | --anchor-a-json JSON) (--anchor-b-pos N | --anchor-b-json JSON) [--step N] [--limit N]

commands.summary: Page candidate rows from one set.
List available metric names for one set.
Compute derived metric expression for a candidate set.
Compute nearest-feature distance metric for candidate set.
commands.usage: candidates score-distance SET_NAME METRIC_NAME [--feature-kind KIND] [--feature-label-regex REGEX] [--feature-geometry feature_span|feature_parts|feature_boundaries] [--feature-boundary any|five_prime|three_prime|start|end] [--strand-relation any|same|opposite]

commands.summary: Compute weighted objective metric for candidate set.
Select top-k candidates by metric with deterministic tie-break.
commands.usage: candidates top-k INPUT_SET OUTPUT_SET --metric METRIC_NAME --k N [--direction max|min] [--tie-break seq_start_end|seq_end_start|length_ascending|length_descending|sequence_lexicographic]

commands.summary: Compute multi-objective Pareto frontier candidate set.
commands.usage: candidates pareto INPUT_SET OUTPUT_SET --objective METRIC[:max|min] [--objective ...] [--max-candidates N] [--tie-break seq_start_end|seq_end_start|length_ascending|length_descending|sequence_lexicographic]

commands.summary: Filter candidate set by metric bounds/quantiles.
commands.usage: candidates filter INPUT_SET OUTPUT_SET --metric METRIC_NAME [--min N] [--max N] [--min-quantile Q] [--max-quantile Q]

commands.summary: Apply set algebra on candidate sets.
commands.usage: candidates set-op union|intersect|subtract LEFT_SET RIGHT_SET OUTPUT_SET

commands.summary: Execute multi-statement workflow script.
List recorded macro-instance lineage rows.
Show one recorded macro-instance lineage row.
List persisted workflow macro templates.
Show one persisted workflow macro template.
Create or update a persisted workflow macro template.
commands.usage: macros template-put TEMPLATE_NAME (--script SCRIPT_OR_@FILE|--file PATH) [--description TEXT] [--details-url URL] [--param NAME|NAME=DEFAULT ...] [--input-port PORT_ID:KIND[:one|many][:required|optional][:description]] [--output-port PORT_ID:KIND[:one|many][:required|optional][:description]]

commands.summary: Delete one persisted workflow macro template.
Import workflow macro templates from a pattern file or directory tree.
Run or validate one persisted workflow macro template with typed preflight and macro-instance lineage recording.
List cloning routines from the typed routine catalog with optional filters.
commands.usage: routines list [--catalog PATH] [--family NAME] [--status NAME] [--tag TAG] [--query TEXT]

commands.summary: Return a structured explanation for one cloning routine, including requirements, failure modes, and likely confusing alternatives.
Compare two cloning routines with deterministic difference axes and shared/unique vocabulary tags.
Execute multi-statement candidate workflow script.
List persisted candidate macro templates.
Show one persisted candidate macro template.
Create or update a persisted candidate macro template.
commands.usage: candidates template-put TEMPLATE_NAME (--script SCRIPT_OR_@FILE|--file PATH) [--description TEXT] [--details-url URL] [--param NAME|NAME=DEFAULT ...]

commands.summary: Delete one persisted candidate macro template.
Run one persisted candidate macro template with bindings.

description: Structured shell/CLI command glossary for GENtle interfaces.
